calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Diaz & Assoc., Inc., a Nevada Corp.
No appearance by the Defendant: Douglas A. Hingst aka Douglas Hingst.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $9,874.18
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $310.00
Sanctions $755.00, for a total of $11,599.18
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff DIAZ & ASSOCIATES INC.'s Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $377.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT = (612/EAH)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Responses W/Out Objection, To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff DIAZ & ASSOCIATES INC.'s Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $377.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT= (612/EAH)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Set For Trial On Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
